description: Sector overlay for airlines, aviation operators, airports, ground handlers, maintenance organizations, aviation training, and aviation service providers in South Africa.

metadata.scope: South Africa-only sector overlay controls for Aviation. Intended to be used with south_africa_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official South African legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: South African Civil Aviation Authority mandate
Air Services Licensing Act 115 of 1990
primary_sources.issuer: Republic of South Africa / Department of Transport

primary_sources.name: Consumer Protection Act, 2008
primary_sources.issuer: Republic of South Africa / National Consumer Commission

primary_sources.name: Occupational Health and Safety Act, 1993
primary_sources.issuer: Republic of South Africa / Department of Employment and Labour

rules.title: SACAA licence, certificate, approval, or authorization evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for SACAA licence, air operator certificate, aviation approval, aircraft registration, or operating permit evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Aviation safety-management or security-programme evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for safety management systems, aviation security, operational control, incident reporting, or risk-management evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Airworthiness, maintenance, or technical-standard evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for airworthiness, maintenance programme, technical standards, inspection, certificate of release, or aircraft parts controls.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Passenger or consumer disclosure and complaint evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for passenger disclosure, complaint, refund, cancellation, baggage, or consumer redress evidence.

rules.title: Ground-handling, maintenance, or airport-service health-and-safety evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for worker safety, ground handling, hazardous materials, PPE, training, or OHS risk controls.
